reviews.review_description: Great practice for job interviews, meetings, crowds, and speech’s. This helped me with a interview. The questions asked would real life questions that could come up.
Used to work till they updated it
Great app no complaints.. I do wish however that there was an arena full of people like concerts..

developer_response.body: Hi, we're working a concert style room at the moment, should be available in 2-4 weeks :)

reviews.review_description: The original version of this app was way better. It gave you tips and had some other room settings.

developer_response.body: Hi, I've just updated the app with some additional room settings and I've added a training room in with public speaking tips. Hope this helps!

reviews.review_description: The peoples look nit real. They have a animation loop of a few seconds. They all look fake from the stuff they do etc.. You cant do anything. You just sit their.. And these peoples look at you. Nothing more. You cant do anything. Its not helping you to learn in front of peoples..
The one thing I would wish for is for a little bit of liveliness or AI from the crowd.
Would be good if the animated audience was interactive so that you can have some sort of feedback into how you perform in each scenario

Seriously. This was great to make fun of family members by telling that they needed to deliver an important speech to these people as they all know them. The result? This family member yammer ed for an hour and a half while we all laughed at them.

Could make it that you could edit questions from the audience on the specific topic you've been practising. Even if its a speech bubble and then you are able to respond to that question and in essence practising your speach
